description: Set's the name of the provided Instance slot upon calling * (Call).

fields.* ([[Impulses|Call]]): Call this to set the Instance (Slot)'s name to Name (String).
fields.Instance: Slot to set the property for.
fields.Name: The value to set Instance (Slot)'s name field to when * (Call) is called.
fields.Next: sends an impulse when Instance (Slot)'s name field is set to Name (String) when * (Call) is called.
